The process that turns nature’s gift into the crunch you crave!

We partner with trusted farms. Fruit is harvested at its best for taste and nutrition.
Harvested at Peak Ripeness
No rush, no shortcuts so every piece captures the beauty and texture of the real thing.
Washed, Sliced & Prepared with Care
Slices are frozen instantly, sealing in its natural colour, taste, and nutrients.
Frozen to Lock in Goodness
Under gentle pressure and without heat or oil, moisture disappears while flavour and nutrients stay.
Freeze-Dried to Perfection
Each batch is carefully packed to protect the crunch and preserve that just-picked feeling.
Sealed for
Freshness

Got Questions?

We’ve Got Crunchy Answers.

What are freeze-dried fruits?

Freeze drying is an advanced food preservation method used by NASA for astronauts. It gently removes moisture from frozen food through pressure preserving nutrients, flavour and colour (without using heat or oil), making the fruit snacks light, crunchy and 100% natural.

How are freeze-dried fruits different from dried or dehydrated fruits?

Traditional dried fruits are made using heat with added sugar/preservatives, which often changes their taste and texture and may reduce nutrients. Freeze-drying preserves up to 97%of the fruit’s nutrition and creates that signature crunchy texture, without added sugar or preservatives.

Can I use them for cooking or baking?

Absolutely! You can add them to smoothies, cereal, yogurt, oatmeal, baking recipes, ice creams or simply enjoy them as a standalone crunchy snack.

Are they suitable for kids?

Yes! It’s a fun, healthy alternative to regular chips or sugary treats which makes it perfect for school tiffins and road trips.

When can I snack on Rype?

Anywhere, anytime whether you’re working, travelling, post-work or when you are just bored

Where do you source your fruits from?

Rype works with trusted international farms that follow high quality and safety standards to ensure every fruit meets our freshness and taste expectations.

Is Rype vegan and gluten-free?

Yes, Rype is 100% plant-based, gluten-free, and made without any animal products.

How long does Rype last?

Because it’s freeze-dried, Rype stays fresh for up to 18 months when stored in a cool, dry place.

Can I order in bulk or for corporate gifting?

Yes! We offer bulk and corporate order options. Please reach out to us at support@rypefood.com or +971-551968909.
